spec_match.rationale: Rewrites the seven deprecated getters to their method forms — directly addresses the migration pain caused by the deprecation.

interactive.rationale: Paste source, click migrate, see rewritten output with per-getter hit counts and a copy-to-clipboard button. Real tool.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises an automated codemod with hit reporting — delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: The codemod now rewrites only variables initialized with `new Intl.Locale(...)`, leaves ambiguous object matches unchanged with a review warning, and reports `currencies` as a skipped getter with no method form.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, deprecated/modern classes use --accent-rose / --accent-emerald colour distinction.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP verified http://localhost:3000/v131/deprecate-getters-of-intl-locale-info/codemod/?verify=after-currencies-skip in Chrome 148. The default sample rewrote 8 confirmed Intl.Locale call sites, kept `loc.currencies` unchanged with a visible skipped getter reason, and kept `prefs.calendars` unchanged with a review warning. A custom `customerLocale` variable initialized with `new Intl.Locale(...)` rewrote correctly, while `prefs.timeZones` remained review-only. The related conformance route reported 10/10 PASS with no console messages.
